languages.text: {n}Триасомата начинает вопить.{/n} "Клешни красные, черные, еретический блеск! Хочет опять разобрать и собрать, разобрать и собрать, разобрать..."
{n}The Triasomata begins to shriek:{/n} "Pincers red and black! Heretic glitter! He wants to disassemble and reassemble me again, disassemble and reassemble, disassemble..."
languages.original_text: {n}Триасомата начинает вопить.{/n} "Клешни красные, черные, еретический блеск! Хочет опять разобрать и собрать, разобрать и собрать, разобрать..."

traits.locale_text: {n}The Triasomata begins to shriek:{/n} "Pincers red and black! Heretic glitter! He wants to disassemble and reassemble me again, disassemble and reassemble, disassemble..."
{n}The Triasomata begins to shriek:{/n} "Pincers red and black! Heretic glitter! He wants to disassemble and reassemble me again, disassemble and reassemble, disassemble..."
{n}The Triasomata begins to shriek:{/n} "Pincers red and black! Heretic glitter! He wants to disassemble and reassemble me again, disassemble and reassemble, disassemble..."

languages.text: {n}トライアスモータが叫ぶように叫ぶ:{/n}「赤い黒い挟む！異端の光り！彼は私を分解して組み立てたい、分解して組み立てて、分解して…」
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata begins to shriek:{/n} "Pincers red and black! Heretic glitter! He wants to disassemble and reassemble me again, disassemble and reassemble, disassemble..."

traits.locale_text: {n}トライアスモータが叫ぶように叫ぶ:{/n}「赤い黒い挟む！異端の光り！彼は私を分解して組み立てたい、分解して組み立てて、分解して…」

languages.text: {n}三相体开始尖叫：{/n}“又红又黑的钳子！异端的光亮！他想把我拆了再拼起来，拆了再拼，拆了……”
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata begins to shriek:{/n} "Pincers red and black! Heretic glitter! He wants to disassemble and reassemble me again, disassemble and reassemble, disassemble..."

traits.locale_text: {n}三相体开始尖叫：{/n}“又红又黑的钳子！异端的光亮！他想把我拆了再拼起来，拆了再拼，拆了……”

languages.text: {n}Le Triasomata se met à hurler.{/n} « Pinces rouges et noires ! Paillettes hérétiques ! Il veut me désassembler et me réassembler, désassembler et réassembler, désassembler... »
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata begins to shriek:{/n} "Pincers red and black! Heretic glitter! He wants to disassemble and reassemble me again, disassemble and reassemble, disassemble..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le Triasomata se met à hurler.{/n} « Pinces rouges et noires ! Paillettes hérétiques ! Il veut me désassembler et me réassembler, désassembler et réassembler, désassembler... »

languages.text: {n}El triasómata empieza a chillar:{/n} «¡Pinzas rojas y negras! ¡Resplandor herético! Quiere descomponerme y recomponerme de nuevo, descomponerme y recomponerme, descomponerme...».
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata begins to shriek:{/n} "Pincers red and black! Heretic glitter! He wants to disassemble and reassemble me again, disassemble and reassemble, disassemble..."

traits.locale_text: {n}El triasómata empieza a chillar:{/n} «¡Pinzas rojas y negras! ¡Resplandor herético! Quiere descomponerme y recomponerme de nuevo, descomponerme y recomponerme, descomponerme...».

languages.text: {n}Üçyeköz çığlık atmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Kırmızı ve siyah kıskaçlar! Kâfir parıltısı! Beni tekrar parçalayıp birleştirmek istiyor. Parçalayıp birleştirmek, parçalayıp..."
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata begins to shriek:{/n} "Pincers red and black! Heretic glitter! He wants to disassemble and reassemble me again, disassemble and reassemble, disassemble..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Üçyeköz çığlık atmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Kırmızı ve siyah kıskaçlar! Kâfir parıltısı! Beni tekrar parçalayıp birleştirmek istiyor. Parçalayıp birleştirmek, parçalayıp..."

languages.text: {n}Der Triasomata beginnt zu kreischen.{/n} "Rote und schwarze Scheren! Ketzerisches Funkeln! Er will mich erneut zerlegen und wieder zusammensetzen, zerlegen und wieder zusammensetzen, zerlegen ..."
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata begins to shriek:{/n} "Pincers red and black! Heretic glitter! He wants to disassemble and reassemble me again, disassemble and reassemble, disassemble..."
